items.description: Vehicle recovery/follow up on I-80 westbound between 3.3 miles east of Exit 178: US 220 NORTH - LOCK HAVEN and 1.3 miles east of Exit 178: US 220 NORTH - LOCK HAVEN. There is a lane restriction.
